who: CFOs of small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For CFOs of small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and managing recurring subscription expenses
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for CFOs seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 CFOs with demo video
Participate in forums where CFOs share tools
try_it: Let users try Monthly expense reporting and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
